formulas.name: Hermaphroditism
formulas.notes: Condition where an individual has both male and female reproductive organs

formulas.name: Monogamy
formulas.notes: Sexual reproduction where one male mates with one female

formulas.name: Polygamy
formulas.notes: Sexual reproduction where one male mates with multiple females

formulas.name: Polyandry
formulas.notes: Sexual reproduction where one female mates with multiple males

formulas.name: Parthenogenesis
formulas.notes: A type of asexual reproduction where an egg develops into an individual without fertilization

formulas.name: Endosperm Formation
formulas.variables: 2n = number of chromosomes in the egg cell, n = number of chromosomes in the pollen cell
formulas.notes: Used in plant reproduction to describe the formation of endosperm

formulas.name: Meiosis
formulas.variables: 2n = diploid number of chromosomes, n = haploid number of chromosomes
formulas.notes: Used in cell division to describe the reduction of chromosome number by half
